title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.308
text:
*115.308.  Inapplicability of sections 115.307 to 115.405, when. — Sections 115.307 to 115.405 shall not apply to candidates for special district offices; township offices in township organization counties; or city, town, and village offices.
(L. 2015 H.B. 63 merged with S.B. 104) 
*Effective 4-08-15 (H.B. 63); 8-28-15 (S.B. 104).  H.B. 63 was vetoed 4-03-15.  The veto was overridden on 4-08-15.
